_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: Tumors were more common in Nf1+/− mice than WT mice, and for Nf1+/− mice tumor incidence increased with increasing radiation dose (p < 0.0001 by χ2 analysis, Figure 2)
details: Tumor incidence increased with increasing radiation dose (p < 0.0001 by χ2 analysis), demonstrating enhanced radiation-induced tumorigenesis compared to wildtype mice
